analysis_layers.title: 反方审稿层
analysis_layers.summary: This layer records why the pick could be wrong before publishing the final entertainment call.
key_drivers: Final model edge +4.7 points toward 平局拉扯.
counter_signals: new injury/lineup evidence changes the strongest positional edge
fresh odds imply a different market favorite
post-match calibration shows this confidence bucket underperforming
small model gap means a single major lineup change can flip the pick
blocked or partial evidence must be resolved before raising confidence
